subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! We have made mention of thee in divers Tablets, both aforetime and after, as a token of grace from Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی انا ذکرناک فی الواح شتی من قبل و من بعد فضلا من عندنا و فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for praise and gratitude
